title: ilex crenata
intro: Ilex crenata, also known as Japanese holly or Japanese evergreen holly, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family, native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Ilex crenata is believed to provide health benefits such as improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Ilex crenata include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
